Dialog.name: MSG_Monad02_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}Ah...! That reading I was telling you about before—it's close![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad02_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}I knew it. They're the same as the ones we saw in Tartarus. But there seems to be more of them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}We'll need to investigate further. Please try getting a little bit closer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad02_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Where to begin investigating is up to you, but be sure to consider your current condition before entering.[n]{f 1 1}
